content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Bluewater Financial
Customer ID: C003
Contract ID: K003
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Call Type: 90-Day Check-in
Date: October 5, 2023
Participants: Sarah Chen (AE), Marcus Webb (Head of Financial Analytics), Priya Nair (Senior Analyst)

Sarah Chen: Marcus, Priya — thanks for your time. We're at the 90-day mark and I wanted to get a read on how the pilot is going with the analytics team.

Marcus Webb: It's going well. Priya's team has been building out the regulatory reporting templates and we've seen real time savings already.

Priya Nair: We cut our monthly reporting prep time by about 30 percent. The scheduled report delivery has been particularly useful — we used to have a manual step every month to compile and distribute reports, and now that runs automatically.

Sarah Chen: That's great to hear. Any friction points?

Marcus Webb: The data residency controls work as expected, which was our main concern. One thing we'd like is more granular permission controls within a single dashboard — right now it's view or edit, and we need something in between for our junior analysts.

Sarah Chen: That's useful feedback. I'll log it as a feature request. It's come up from a couple of other customers in financial services so it may have some momentum on the roadmap.

Marcus Webb: Good to know. We're planning to present the pilot results to the CRO next month. If that goes well, we'll be looking at expanding to the risk team — probably 15 to 20 additional users.

Sarah Chen: Exciting. Let's plan to reconnect after that presentation. I can have a proposal ready to go so you're not waiting if the CRO gives the green light.
